{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Redefinition
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Redefinition]] can alter a device's relationship to the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
